title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Yoav Weiss - Trust-Minimized Interop with EIL
description:
Yoav Weiss, researcher at the Ethereum Foundation, explains the inherent problems of decentralizing solver. He then breaks down how EIL reframes interop - users carry out all transaction executions themselves, while XLPs only supply gas and liquidity.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
